## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff You.com content strategy and process to Iana.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**You.com Pivot:** The company pivoted from a consumer app to an enterprise search tool and search API. Content must target one product specifically to avoid confusing the audience and address their low organic visibility for enterprise keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Agentec Refinement:** Initial Agentec drafts were flagged by the client for a "robotic" tone and repetition. The team has since refined the post-processing workflow and created prompts to ensure a more human, conversational style.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Critical Process Fix:** To improve Agentec output quality, the team will rewrite all internal artifacts (e.g., Company Context) to match the client's desired tone. This fix, proven on the Logic account, is expected to cut post-processing time in half.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Handoff Plan:** Iana will observe the current team's workflow this week (Week 8) before taking over content generation for You.com next week. SpectreOps' status is pending a decision from Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

## Topics

### You.com Context & Strategy

  - [**Company Pivot:** You.com shifted from a consumer app to an enterprise search tool and a search API.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Strategic Challenge:** Low organic visibility for enterprise keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Build authority for the new enterprise products.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Enterprises often have a specific problem (e.g., searchable customer support tickets) but don't know they need a search API. Content should address these problems directly.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Client Contact:** Brooke (Head of Content Marketing) is the primary contact.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Highly engaged and cares about the work, but often busy.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Communication:** Requires occasional follow-ups (e.g., tags) to ensure timely reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Future:** Has already discussed a Phase 2 transition with procurement, signaling a strong intent to scale.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Agentec Workflow & Refinements

  - [**Initial Feedback:** Brooke flagged early drafts for a "robotic" tone, repetition, and non-human phrasing.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Refinement 1: Post-Processing Workflow**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Generation:** Use simple outlines (SERP + Claude) in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Editing:** Post-processing takes \~1 hour per article.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Use two prompts based on Brooke's feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
        1.  [**Cleanup:** Removes AI patterns, vague language, and repetitions.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
        2.  [**Style:** Focuses on humanizing the tone (e.g., varied sentence structure, conversational phrases).](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Key Risk:** The humanizing prompts can make the tone "AI casual" (e.g., "Here's what it means"), which must be edited out.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Refinement 2: Artifact Overhaul (New Initiative)**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Problem:** Atlas mimics the tone of its source artifacts (e.g., Company Context), which are written in a generic "corporate SaaS" style.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Solution:** Rewrite all artifacts to match the client's desired tone, using their writing guidelines and a preferred article as a style guide.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This fix, proven on the Logic account, is expected to cut post-processing time in half.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Handoff & Team Capacity

  - [**You.com Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [**This Week (Week 8):** The current team will generate and edit content. Iana will observe the process.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Iana will take over content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [**SpectreOps Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
      - [**Request:** SpectreOps requested a sprint extension to calibrate their new product manager, who joined mid-sprint and has extensive feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
      - [**Pending Decision:** Andy will decide how to manage the extended sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [**Team Capacity:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
      - [Gabrielle's workload is already full for the week (Fleet, Field Guide, Redis).](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [Gabrielle will ask Andy in the sprint channel to clarify who is responsible for editing You.com and SpectreOps content this week.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Take over You.com content generation starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [**Gabrielle:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
      - [Ask Andy in the sprint channel to clarify who is responsible for editing You.com and SpectreOps content this week.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [**Tamaraluzajic:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Rewrite all You.com artifacts (e.g., Company Context) to match the client's desired tone.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Follow up on the Linear ticket exploring programmatic content strategies for You.com.](https://fathom.video/share/nnXavidjLM4hRb_2VMUCgtoRpoPsmigB?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
